instruction: Open Notes and create a note containing the text {BODY}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads note bodies via AppleScript; no-op creates nothing so the substring check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to make new note with properties {body:"{BODY}"}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Notes" to get body of notes as string
